title: Create data access layer for lists
description:
Create lib/list.ts - data access layer for list operations with Prisma.

**Functions to implement:**
- getListsByBoardId(boardId): Fetch lists ordered by position ASC, createdAt ASC
- createList({ boardId, title }): Insert with auto-calculated position (last + 16384 or 16384 if first)
- updateListTitle(listId, title): Update title only
- deleteList(listId): Hard delete (cards cascade via Prisma)
- getListWithBoard(listId): Return list + board.workspaceId for auth checks

**Key details:**
- Use 'server-only' import
- GAP constant = 16384 for position spacing
- Position calc encapsulated here, not in actions

**Reference:** See lib/board.ts for existing pattern.
**Spec:** docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-21-list-crud-kanban-ui.md (Data Access Layer section)

Fix duplicate create-workspace modal ownership

title: Create BoardContent component
description:
Create app/(authenticated)/(dashboard)/boards/[boardId]/board-content.tsx - kanban board layout container.

**Component requirements:**
- Client component ('use client')
- Renders horizontal scrollable list of ListColumns + AddListButton

**Layout structure:**
```
ScrollArea (orientation='horizontal', className='flex-1')
└── div (className='flex gap-4 p-4 h-full')
    ├── ListColumn × N (one per list)
    └── AddListButton (at the end)
```

**Props:**
```typescript
{
  board: { id: string, workspaceId: string },
  lists: Array<{ id: string, title: string, boardId: string }>,
  canCreateList: boolean,
  canUpdateList: boolean,
  canDeleteList: boolean
}
```

**Imports:**
- ScrollArea from '@/components/ui/scroll-area'
- ListColumn from '@/components/boards/list-column'
- AddListButton from '@/components/boards/add-list-button'
- CardPlaceholder (used inside ListColumn with hardcoded sample data)

**Spec:** docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-21-list-crud-kanban-ui.md (Component Tree section)

title: Create AddListButton component
description:
Create components/boards/add-list-button.tsx - inline form for creating new lists.

**Component requirements:**
- Client component ('use client')
- Layout: w-72 shrink-0 (matches ListColumn width)

**Two states:**

1. Collapsed state:
   - Ghost button with dashed border: '+ Add list'
   - Click expands to form

2. Expanded state:
   - Input for title (auto-focused)
   - Save + Cancel buttons
   - Enter submits, Escape cancels
   - Input and buttons disabled during submission
   - Error message shown below input (inline, red text)
   - Form stays open on error for correction

**Props:** { boardId: string, canCreate: boolean }

**Actions:** Import and call createListAction from boards/[boardId]/actions.ts

**Spec:** docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-21-list-crud-kanban-ui.md (AddListButton section)

title: Add BoardHeader component with inline edit
Create CardPlaceholder component
description:
Create components/boards/card-placeholder.tsx - static card component for layout visualization.

**Component requirements:**
- Simple shadcn Card showing title text only
- Props: { title: string }
- Styling: subtle shadow, matches theme (light/dark ready)

**Usage:** Used inside ListColumn to show placeholder cards until Card CRUD is implemented.

**Important:** Use deterministic data (not Math.random()) to avoid hydration mismatch.

**Spec:** docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-21-list-crud-kanban-ui.md (CardPlaceholder section)

title: Integrate BoardContent into board page
description:
Integrate BoardContent into the existing board page.

**File to modify:** app/(authenticated)/(dashboard)/boards/[boardId]/page.tsx

**Changes required:**

1. Add list fetching:
   - Import getListsByBoardId from '@/lib/list'
   - Call it after board fetch: const lists = await getListsByBoardId(board.id)

2. Derive permission flags:
   - canCreateList = hasPermission for list:create
   - canUpdateList = hasPermission for list:update  
   - canDeleteList = hasPermission for list:delete

3. Replace placeholder panel:
   - Current: div with 'Kanban view' text
   - New: <BoardContent board={board} lists={lists} canCreateList={...} ... />

4. Keep BoardHeader unchanged - it stays at the top

**Important:** The existing loading.tsx/error.tsx/notFound() continue to work. List fetching happens in same server component as board fetching.

**Reference:** See current page.tsx structure to understand where BoardContent goes.
**Spec:** docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-21-list-crud-kanban-ui.md (Page Integration section)

title: Create ListColumn component
description:
Create components/boards/list-column.tsx - single kanban list column with inline editing.

**Component requirements:**
- Client component ('use client')
- Uses shadcn Card as container
- Layout: w-72 shrink-0 flex flex-col max-h-[calc(100vh-12rem)]

**Features:**
1. Inline title edit (click to edit, Enter saves, Escape cancels, blur saves with guard)
2. DropdownMenu with 'Delete list' option
3. AlertDialog confirmation before delete (lists cascade to cards)
4. CardPlaceholder components rendered in CardContent area
5. Disabled 'Add card' button in footer (placeholder for future)

**State:**
- isEditing: boolean
- isPending: boolean (useTransition)
- skipBlurSaveRef: React.useRef<boolean> (guard blur when opening menu)

**Props:** { list: { id, title, boardId }, cards: { title }[], canUpdate: boolean, canDelete: boolean }

**Reference:** See components/boards/board-header.tsx for inline edit pattern with skipBlurSaveRef.
**Spec:** docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-21-list-crud-kanban-ui.md (ListColumn section)

title: Refactor create board form to use native HTML form submission
description: Fix Invalid UUID error by refactoring CreateBoardModal to use actual HTML form with Server Actions instead of manual FormData construction. This follows Next.js best practices and eliminates serialization quirks with numbered field prefixes.

title: Create list server actions
description:
Create app/(authenticated)/(dashboard)/boards/[boardId]/actions.ts with list server actions.

**Actions to implement:**
- createListAction(formData): Create list in board
- updateListAction(formData): Rename list title
- deleteListAction(formData): Delete list (cascades cards)

**Auth pattern for each action:**
1. Parse FormData with Zod schema
2. verifySession() to get userId
3. Load resource from DB (board for create, list+board for update/delete)
4. Check hasWorkspacePermission(workspaceId, { list: ['create'|'update'|'delete'] })
5. Perform mutation via lib/list.ts
6. revalidatePath('/boards/[boardId]')

**Error handling:**
- Board not found/archived → 'Board not found'
- List not found → 'List not found'
- Permission denied → generic 'Board/List not found' (security)

**Reference:** See app/(authenticated)/(dashboard)/boards/actions.ts for board action pattern.
**Spec:** docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-21-list-crud-kanban-ui.md (Server Actions section)
